all_text_content:
Verse of the Day
And the people believed: and when they heard that the Lord had visited the children of Israel, and that he had looked upon their affliction, then they bowed their heads and worshipped.
Exodus 4:31
Quote of the Day
"The Lord expects us to be strong in our testimonies, to be full of faith, and to repent daily."
Sister Andrea Muñoz Spannaus | 1 Oct 2025General Conference
